summary: Student Referral Dashboard testing complete. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend flows verified: enrolled student sees unlocked referrals page with code/stats, pending student sees locked state, registration page handles ?ref= query param correctly with live validation.

minor.issue: Missing enum values for referral_self_attempt, referral_ip_abuse, referral_code_generated, referral_commission_created in enum_audit_logs_action_type - FIXED by adding values

passed_tests: POST /api/referrals/validate - Valid code returns referrer info with £50 bonus message
POST /api/referrals/validate - Invalid code returns 404 with error
POST /api/referrals/validate - Missing code returns 400
POST /api/referrals/validate - Self-referral attempt is blocked (400)
POST /api/referrals/track-click - Creates referral tracking record
POST /api/referrals/track-click - Invalid code returns 404
POST /api/referrals/track-click - Missing code returns 400
GET /api/referrals/my-code - Enrolled student gets code P4G-TEST1234 with share link
GET /api/referrals/my-code - Pending student gets 403 with status
GET /api/referrals/my-code - No auth returns 401
GET /api/referrals/my-stats - Enrolled student gets referral stats
GET /api/referrals/my-stats - Pending student gets 403
UI: Enrolled student login redirects to /portal/student
UI: Enrolled student referrals page shows UNLOCKED state
UI: Copy code, Copy link, Share buttons present and functional
UI: Stats cards show Total Referrals, Pending, Enrolled, Total Earned
UI: Referrals table shows pending referrals with status badges
UI: Pending student referrals page shows LOCKED state
UI: Lock icon and 'Complete your payment' message displayed
UI: Registration page pre-fills referral code from ?ref= URL param
UI: Referral code validation shows green checkmark for valid code
UI: 'Referred by [name]' message displayed when code is valid
UI: Sidebar shows 'Refer a Friend' navigation item with pulse indicator
critical_code_review_comments: Referral system fully implemented with proper fraud guards (self-referral, IP abuse)
Commission processing for referrals properly integrated in CommissionService.js
Frontend has proper conditional states (locked vs unlocked) based on enrollment status
data-testid attributes added for all key interactive elements
seed_data_creation: Enrolled student has 4 pending referrals from click tracking tests. Test referral code P4G-TEST1234 is pre-seeded.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referral system fully tested and working. All /api/referrals/* endpoints functional. Frontend shows correct locked/unlocked states based on enrollment. Registration page captures referral code from URL and validates in real-time. Database enum values for audit logs were added during testing.

mocked_integrations.stripe: MOCKED - Stripe payments in mock mode
mocked_integrations.gohighlevel: MOCKED - GoHighLevel notifications in mock mode

referral_code_generation.enrolled_student: Returns P4G-TEST1234 with share_link and bonus_amount=50

referral_validation.valid_code: Returns referrer name and bonus message
referral_validation.self_referral: Returns 400 with 'cannot use your own referral code'

frontend_states.enrolled_student: Unlocked - shows code, share buttons, stats, referrals table
frontend_states.pending_student: Locked - shows lock icon, 'complete payment' message, how it works

registration_page.validation: Real-time validation with green checkmark and referrer name

database_fixes_applied.description: Added missing enum values to enum_audit_logs_action_type
